summary: Completed testing of Payment Flow (Stripe mock mode) and Notification System (GoHighLevel mock mode). All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified student login, dashboard, and payment page. Admin and Rep logins also verified. Stripe and GoHighLevel are MOCKED as expected.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login (admin@plan4growth.uk/password123) returns valid token with role=admin
Backend: Rep login (rep@plan4growth.uk/password123) returns valid token with role=rep
Backend: Student login (student@test.com/student123) returns valid token with role=student
Backend: Invalid credentials correctly rejected with 401
Backend: GET /api/payments/config returns mock mode with course_fee=£7999, commission_rate=4%
Backend: GET /api/notifications/config returns mock mode with provider=GoHighLevel
Backend: POST /api/notifications/test/email (admin only) sends mock email successfully
Backend: POST /api/notifications/test/sms (admin only) sends mock SMS successfully
Backend: Non-admin users correctly rejected from test notification endpoints (403)
Backend: GET /api/payments/my-info returns student payment info with stripe_mode=mock
Backend: GET /api/payments/checkout/status/:sessionId returns paid for mock sessions
Backend: Enrolled student correctly rejected from creating new checkout session
Frontend: Login page loads correctly
Frontend: Student login successful and redirects to /portal/student
Frontend: Student dashboard shows enrolled status with enrollment number P4G-2024-001
Frontend: Student payments page shows 'Payment Complete!' with payment history
Frontend: Fee summary shows Total Course Fee £7,999, Amount Paid £7,999, Remaining £0
Frontend: Payment history shows payment_id pay_c67120a3eaa0 with status=paid
Frontend: Admin login successful and redirects to /portal/admin
Frontend: Admin dashboard shows 1 Total Student, 1 Enrolled, £7,999 Total Revenue
Frontend: Rep login successful and redirects to /portal/rep
Frontend: Rep dashboard shows commission info (4%, £319.96/student)
seed_data_creation: Student 'student@test.com' was already enrolled with payment from previous testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment flow and notification system tested in MOCK mode. Student (student@test.com) is already enrolled and has paid full £7,999. To test actual Pay Now button flow, would need to create a new student via rep portal and get them approved by admin first. All 3 user roles (admin, rep, student) can login successfully with provided credentials.

stripe.notes: Creates mock checkout sessions (cs_mock_*), mock sessions return payment_status=paid automatically

gohighlevel.notes: Test notifications log to console, returns mock messageId

payment_flow.enrolled_student_blocked: Enrolled student cannot create new checkout session (400 error)

notification_system.access_control: Non-admin users get 403 when accessing test endpoints
